features.featureTitle: Rewrite all seven friend tribute message paragraphs in `frontend/src/data/friendsData.ts` to use a warm and playful third-person tone, written as if the entire friend group is collectively hyping up each person (e.g., 'We all know her as...', 'Ask anyone in the group and they'll tell you...', 'She's the one we all turn to when...'). The voice should feel like a group shoutout, not a personal message from one person. Apply this to every friend entry in the array.
